name: Lmon.cropFrac
title: Percentage Crop Cover
description: Percentage of entire grid cell  that is covered by crop.
processing note: Note that if this variable is independent of time, it should be stored only for a single time (user choice). CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: mean where land over all\_area\_types time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean,
